title: AgentOrchestrationInterfaces
description: Shared cross-runtime payloads for remote-agent orchestration. Subject names live in @dd/nats-subject-defs; these types describe the JSON bodies sent across those subjects.

AgentTaskQueueMessage.title: AgentTaskQueueMessage
AgentTaskQueueMessage.description: JSON payload published to the per-thread NATS task subject and orchestrator wakeup subject when a remote-agent task is queued for async execution.

taskKind.description: Logical task kind. Agent prompt execution uses 'agent.prompt'.

shadow.description: True when this message should only prepare or warm a worker and must not execute the prompt.

directDispatch.description: True when direct worker dispatch already owns execution and NATS is only being used for auxiliary wakeup or preparation.

dispatchMode.description: Requested dispatch mode after normalization, e.g. 'queued', 'direct', 'queued-pool', or 'container-pool'.

containerPoolDispatch.description: True when the queue consumer should route execution through the container-pool runtime instead of a per-thread pod.

provider.description: Optional agent provider requested by the dispatch UI/API.

repo.description: Git repository URL or slug for the thread workspace.

baseBranch.description: Base branch used to prepare the thread workspace.

featureBranch.description: Feature branch to use or resume for the task, when already known.

prompt.description: User prompt for the queued agent task.

threadTitle.description: Optional display title used when deriving a new thread branch.

contextMode.description: Context injection mode selected by the operator, e.g. automatic, selected, or none.

contextIds.description: Selected durable context IDs to hydrate before agent execution.

createdAtMs.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the producer created the envelope.
